news.title: Xbox Series X/S is getting a major price increase, as Microsoft becomes the latest company to blame skyrocketing RAM and storage costs
news.titleEN: Xbox Series X/S is getting a major price increase, as Microsoft becomes the latest company to blame skyrocketing RAM and storage costs
news.desc: Microsoft has announced significant price increases of $100 USD and beyond for its Xbox Series X/S consoles, blaming the rising costs of memory and storage for the move. Read more

news.title: Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc in the box, Insomniac assures players as GTA 6's download code approach sends ripples around the industry
news.titleEN: Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc in the box, Insomniac assures players as GTA 6's download code approach sends ripples around the industry
news.desc: Insomniac Games has assured fans not to worry: unlike the impending GTA 6, the physical edition of Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc when it releases exclusively on PlayStation 5 on 15th September. Read more
news.descEN: Insomniac Games has assured fans not to worry: unlike the impending GTA 6, the physical edition of Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc when it releases exclusively on PlayStation 5 on 15th September. Read more

news.title: A proper physical edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 will arrive before the year's end, insider claims
